name: Aurral
short_desc: Self-hosted music discovery and request management for Lidarr.
author: lklynet
description: Aurral is a self-hosted music discovery and request management app for Lidarr. It offers library-aware recommendations, granular monitoring controls, and optional Weekly Flow playlists powered by Soulseek and Navidrome.

form_fields.label: PUID
form_fields.hint: User ID to run the container as.

form_fields.label: PGID
form_fields.hint: Group ID to run the container as.
